title: Balsamic Midnight Halal Bazaar
description: A fermented, velvety Russian dish with a midnight-craving taste featuring balsamic vinegar and tandoor-fried halal-friendly components.
instructions: Preheat your tandoor to a temperature of at least 475°F.
Mix balsamic vinegar, minced garlic, and olive oil in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Rub the chicken breast lightly with the mixed vinegar-olive oil mixture on both sides.
Place the seasoned chicken breasts onto the tandoor grill for 8-10 minutes per side until cooked through and golden brown.
Slice the halal-friendly meat thinly, place it in a bowl and drizzle more balsamic vinegar over it to enhance flavors.
